attacking_style: Capable of making successful breakaway selections but lacks the finishing power to convert, showing a pattern of getting into the right moves without closing them out.
team_tactics: Israel Premier Tech shows willingness to animate races with multiple riders but suffers from coordination issues, with domestiques forced to chase separately rather than working as a unified block.
terrain_preference: Selective enough to make breakaway cuts on varied terrain, though specific gradient preferences unclear from limited data.
vulnerability: Sprint finishes from breakaways expose a critical weakness - lost two sprint finishes in three days despite making successful selections, indicating poor top-end speed.
key_patterns: Gets into breakaways but consistently fails to finish them off in sprints.
Team lacks tactical cohesion when multiple riders are active in same race.
form_trajectory: negative: pattern of failed sprint conversions from breakaways suggests fundamental finishing weakness rather than temporary form issue
